---
title: "Carbon Inversion"
subtitle: "Constraining carbon cycle fluxes with satellites"
---

## Overview

We use inverse modelling to estimate regional carbon dioxide and methane fluxes by assimilating satellite observations into atmospheric transport models. These flux estimates help evaluate ecosystem processes and support national inventories.

## Outcomes

- A regional inverse model for North America that integrates multiple satellite platforms.
- Improved priors for biosphere uptake and fossil‑fuel emissions.
- Publications in preparation and shared code repositories.

## Team

- [Dr. Sean M. R. Crowell](../../../people/members/sean-crowell/index.qmd) – principal investigator.
